ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "rate" REAL /* User rating of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or plot summary of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster image */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie (e.g., released, in production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, moderator) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (0.0 to 10.0) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Optional text review accompanying the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's viewing session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the movie to their watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the movie as a favorite */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie marked as a favorite */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (0.0 to 10.0) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was written */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment for nested comments */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES movie_reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the tag is for */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_tags_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the actor's profile image */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the actor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the actor is currently active in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES movie_actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's profile image */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the director */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the director is currently active in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_director_map" (
  "director_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_director_map_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES movie_directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_director_map_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
